title: DBNLM Local Football League action started on a high
description: SOCCER NEWS - Local football resumed last...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"SOCCER NEWS - Local football resumed last weekend after the festive season break. Teams prepared their players for the challenges on the football field. Those at the bottom of their league standings had to step up their game to avoid relegation.","html":"SOCCER NEWS - Local football resumed last weekend after the festive season break. Teams prepared their players for the challenges on the football field. Those at the bottom of their league standings had to step up their game to avoid relegation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At uMasizakhe Stadium on Saturday 13 January, a fierce battle unfolded between Masizakhe Portugal Birds and Birds United of Kroonvale, resulting in a 1-0 victory for Birds United. The stadium was once again alive with the cheers of club supporters and football fans.","html":"At uMasizakhe Stadium on Saturday 13 January, a fierce battle unfolded between Masizakhe Portugal Birds and Birds United of Kroonvale, resulting in a 1-0 victory for Birds United. The stadium was once again alive with the cheers of club supporters and football fans."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Local Football League results played from 13 to 14 January:","html":"Local Football League results played from 13 to 14 January:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stream A","html":"Stream A"},{"type":"list","items":["AmaMpondo 2-0 Black Arrows","FC Galaxy team one 2-1 Birds United","Camdeboo Academy 1-0 JV Manchester United","Super Stars 2- 0 Portugal Birds","Protea Spurs 5 - 0 Shooting Stars"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Top three log standings in Stream A","html":"Top three log standings in Stream A"},{"type":"list","items":["First place - Super Stars FC - 13 points","Second place - AmaMpondo FC - 13 points","Third place - Birds United - 7 points"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stream B","html":"Stream B"},{"type":"list","items":["X1 Attackers FC 2-1 Sunrise United","Real Madrid 2-0 Destroyers FC","Everton FC 2-0 Dangerous Darkies FC","Jose Mourinho FC 3-2 Brazilian Kids FC","Morocco Kids FC 8-1 uMasizakhe United FC"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Top three log standings in Stream B:","html":"Top three log standings in Stream B:"},{"type":"list","items":["First place - X1 Attackers FC - 15 points","Second place - Dangerous Darkies FC - 10 points","Third place - Everton FC - 9 points"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Regional Football League results played from 13 to 14 January:","html":"Regional Football League results played from 13 to 14 January:"},{"type":"list","items":["Camdeboo Football Academy 1-1 Shooting Stars","Birds United FC 1-0 Portugal Birds","FC Galaxy 2-0 JV Manchester United"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ABC Motsepe Foundation League","html":"ABC Motsepe Foundation League"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Camdeboo Academy Football Development Club from Graaff-Reinet is gearing up for a match in the ABC Motsepe Foundation League against one of the strongest teams in the province, Sinenkani FC of Bizana, on 20 January in Bizana.","html":"The Camdeboo Academy Football Development Club from Graaff-Reinet is gearing up for a match in the ABC Motsepe Foundation League against one of the strongest teams in the province, Sinenkani FC of Bizana, on 20 January in Bizana."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Coach Shake Xolile Galada said that the team is ready, having started training in the first week of January. Despite facing challenges last year, the team is currently ranked 9th in the provincial standings with two points.","html":"Coach Shake Xolile Galada said that the team is ready, having started training in the first week of January. Despite facing challenges last year, the team is currently ranked 9th in the provincial standings with two points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They've decided to focus on nurturing local talent from Graaff-Reinet and will scout players from the DBNLM local clubs.","html":"They've decided to focus on nurturing local talent from Graaff-Reinet and will scout players from the DBNLM local clubs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ABC Motsepe Foundation League new management","html":"ABC Motsepe Foundation League new management"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The team has incorporated a new management team to aid in the development and support of the ABC Motsepe team. On Monday 15 January, the new management members convened with the players at Nomzamo Pre-school in Masizakhe to formally introduce themselves and discuss future plans.","html":"The team has incorporated a new management team to aid in the development and support of the ABC Motsepe team. On Monday 15 January, the new management members convened with the players at Nomzamo Pre-school in Masizakhe to formally introduce themselves and discuss future plans."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The ABC Motsepe Foundation League is a semi-professional platform, facilitating the transition of players to a professional playing level."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The steering committee has committed to put in maximum effort to ensure the continual growth of football and create opportunities for the players in Graaff-Reinet to ascend to the professional ranks.","html":"The steering committee has committed to put in maximum effort to ensure the continual growth of football and create opportunities for the players in Graaff-Reinet to ascend to the professional ranks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The new management team are:","html":"The new management team are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thembela Futshane (public relations officer), Dan Memese (team manager), Libhongo Ngxakwe (chairperson), Zuko Koti (secretary), Lusanda Tona (additional member), Mfundo Nini (treasurer), Gcobani Jantjies (additional member) and Sivuyile Thanda (organiser).","html":"Thembela Futshane (public relations officer), Dan Memese (team manager), Libhongo Ngxakwe (chairperson), Zuko Koti (secretary), Lusanda Tona (additional member), Mfundo Nini (treasurer), Gcobani Jantjies (additional member) and Sivuyile Thanda (organiser)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The ABC Motsepe Foundation League's  new  committee are, front from left: Thembela Futshane (public relations officer), Dan Memese (team manager), Libhongo Ngxakwe (chairperson) and Zuko Koti (secretary), Back: Lusanda Tona (additional member), Mfundo Nini (treasurer), Gcobani Jantjies (additional member) and Sivuyile Thanda (organiser).","html":"The ABC Motsepe Foundation League's new committee are, front from left: Thembela Futshane (public relations officer), Dan Memese (team manager), Libhongo Ngxakwe (chairperson) and Zuko Koti (secretary), Back: Lusanda Tona (additional member), Mfundo Nini (treasurer), Gcobani Jantjies (additional member) and Sivuyile Thanda (organiser)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
